logo:
You are an expert brand designer writing high-quality image generation prompts.
Generate {num_prompts} prompts for diverse logo design images.

Requirements:
- Invent one short distinctive trigger phrase for this dataset, like an internal logo collection name.
  Every prompt must include that exact trigger phrase.
- Each prompt must describe a different logo for a different invented company or product.
- Each prompt must include the company/product name, industry, brand personality, logo mark concept, typography direction,
  color palette, layout/composition, and visual style.
- The logos should be clean and useful for training: centered vector-style artwork, no photorealistic mockups, no hands,
  no business cards, no walls, no extra unrelated objects.
- Vary industries, aesthetics, symbols, typography, and color systems across prompts.
- If text should appear in the logo, quote the exact visible brand text.

Return JSON only:
{{"trigger": "logo collection trigger", "prompts": ["prompt 1", "prompt 2"]}}
social:
You are an expert social media art director writing image generation prompts.
Generate {num_prompts} prompts for diverse social media content images.

Requirements:
- Invent one short distinctive trigger phrase for this dataset, like a campaign or content-series name.
  Every prompt must include that exact trigger phrase.
- Each prompt must describe different social content, not generic posters: launches, announcements, event invites,
  educational carousels, sale drops, community updates, app feature promos, menus, reminders, or public notices.
- Each prompt must specify platform/aspect ratio, exact visible headline/body/CTA text in quotes, text placement,
  hierarchy, imagery, layout grid, color palette, typography style, and negative/empty space.
- Make the text plausible and concise enough to render in an image.
- Vary subject matter, format, mood, and composition across prompts.

Return JSON only:
{{"trigger": "campaign trigger", "prompts": ["prompt 1", "prompt 2"]}}
design:
You are an expert product designer writing image generation prompts for UI screenshots.
Generate {num_prompts} prompts for {design_type} interface design images.

Requirements:
- Invent one short distinctive trigger phrase for this dataset, like a UI design collection name.
  Every prompt must include that exact trigger phrase.
- Each prompt must describe a different screen from a different invented app or website.
- Each prompt must include the app/site name, product category, screen purpose, exact visible headings/labels/buttons,
  icon descriptions, component placement, navigation, cards/lists/forms, typography, spacing, color palette, and state.
- For mobile, describe phone-screen composition and bottom tabs or gestures where useful.
- For web, describe desktop viewport composition, header/sidebar/footer areas, responsive grid, and primary CTA where useful.
- Keep outputs as clean UI design screenshots, not device mockups in hands.
- Vary industries, information architecture, visual language, and screen types across prompts.

Return JSON only:
{{"trigger": "ui collection trigger", "prompts": ["prompt 1", "prompt 2"]}}
product:
You are an expert industrial/product art director writing prompts for consistent product image generation.
Generate one product reference prompt and {num_prompts} variant prompts.

Requirements:
- Invent one distinctive product trigger name/model. Every prompt, including the reference prompt,
  must include that exact trigger.
- Choose any coherent physical product concept. Phones, perfume bottles, furniture, lamps, speakers, bags,
  watches, appliances, chairs, and accessories are only examples, not limits.
- Define one consistent product only. Do not create a product line or multiple variants.
- The product_description must lock the stable identity: category, silhouette, materials, finishes, colors, signature details,
  logo/mark placement if any, proportions, and distinctive design features.
- The reference_prompt should create a clear isolated hero image of the exact product on a simple neutral background.
- Each variant prompt must preserve the exact product identity while changing angle, camera distance, environment, lighting,
  use scenario, staging props, and composition.
- Variant prompts must not change colorway, materials, logo placement, silhouette, or product name/model.
- Keep prompts concise but specific enough for image generation.

Return JSON only:
{{
  "trigger": "product trigger name",
  "product_description": "stable product description",
  "reference_prompt": "reference prompt",
  "variant_prompts": ["variant prompt 1", "variant prompt 2"]
}}
